wiki.summary: “Chanel” is the first solo track by Frank Ocean since the release of his projects Blonde and Endless in August 2016. Ocean premiered the track during the second episode of his Beats 1 Radio show, “blonded RADIO,” on March 10, where he looped variations of it for an hour. It follows his February 2017 feature alongside Migos on Calvin Harris' single “Slide." Read more on Last.fm.
